title: uDOS User Setup & Configuration
description: Complete your uDOS environment setup with intelligent dataset integration

fields.name: username
fields.label: 👤 Username
fields.help: Enter a unique username (3-20 characters, alphanumeric and underscore only)

fields.name: full_name
fields.label: 👋 Full Name
fields.help: Enter your full name for display purposes

fields.name: email
fields.label: 📧 Email Address
fields.help: Enter your email for notifications and system communications

fields.name: location
fields.label: 📍 Location
fields.help: Search and select your location from the global dataset (e.g., London, New York, AX14)

fields.name: timezone
fields.label: 🕒 Timezone
fields.help: Select your timezone (auto-detected from location if available)

fields.name: primary_role
fields.label: 🎯 Primary Role
fields.help: Select your primary role - this affects available commands and default settings

fields.name: password
fields.label: 🔑 Password
fields.help: Set a password for your uDOS session (leave blank for no password protection)

fields.name: auto_backup
fields.label: 💾 Enable Auto Backup
fields.help: Automatically backup your work, configurations, and mission progress

fields.name: debug_mode
fields.label: 🔧 Enable Debug Mode
fields.help: Enable detailed logging and debugging information (recommended for developers)

fields.name: preferred_companion
fields.label: 🤖 Preferred Companion
fields.help: Choose your default AI companion for assistance and guidance

fields.name: notification_level
fields.label: 🔔 Notification Level
fields.help: Control the level of system notifications you receive

fields.name: experimental_features
fields.label: 🧪 Enable Experimental Features
fields.help: Access cutting-edge features that are still in development (may be unstable)
